name: superduperpowers
description: Local-first skills and agents for deliberate coding workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows
interface.longDescription: SuperDuperPowers is an alpha local-first workflow toolkit for Codex and compatible coding agents. It packages skills for brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows. Public marketplace publication is planned for a future v1 release.
defaultPrompt: Use SuperDuperPowers brainstorming to shape this feature before implementation.
Use SuperDuperPowers to write an implementation plan for this change.
